title: Section 26231.2
text: If the amended articles conform, as provided in Section 26231.1, provisions in the articles of incorporation that appeared in the original articles or some previous amended articles, are ineffective if, and to the extent that, they are inapplicable to, or inconsistent with, this chapter. (Added by Stats. 2017, Ch. 27, Sec. 107. (SB 94) Effective June 27, 2017.) BPC Business and Professions Code - BPC 11.
